title: Rapid Optimization
description:
A concise and ultimate optimization modpack!
with full cross-platform support across all versions.
body:
[дёӯж–Үд»Ӣз»ҚзңӢиҝҷйҮҢпјҒпјҒпјҒпјҒпјҒ](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/1159.html)

![ж Үйўҳ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b6ebdda1ec20a8fd61d9a91951c05ca3bd82d3f.webp)
Are you unable to get a smooth gaming experience due to low equipment configuration? Or do you simply want to squeeze out every frame?
# introduce
**вҖҢRapid Optimization Modpack is dedicated to ultimate Minecraft optimization, delivering a higher FPS boost than standard optimization modpacks!**

This modpack supports most Minecraft versions and is compatible with multiple mod loaders: NeoForge, Forge, and Fabric.

вҖҢWithin this modpack, you'll only find handpicked optimization mods. For each version, the author strives to maximize performance by selecting the best possible solutions.

If you're a player with lower-end hardware or want to test your device's maximum frame rates, and you're looking for an optimal set of optimization mods without any extras, this modpack perfectly fits your needs!

The author can confidently claim that this modpack offers better results than the vast majority of current optimization modpacks, as others more or less include unnecessary mods that consume performance.
# Performance Comparison
Comparison of Effect Testing [Comparison of Ordinary Forest -1.21.1 Version 12 Rendering Distance 8 Simulated Distance, Seed 4647440608836899410]
| vanilla             | 1.21.1NeoForge               |  1.21.1Fabric    | 1.21.1Fabulously Optimized    |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| 900-1000FPS          | 2200-2300FPS           | 2000-2100FPS             | 1600-1700FPS            |

# precautions
1.Due to mod compatibility factors, вҖҢthe effectiveness may vary across different versionsвҖҢ. [Especially since the 1.18.2 base game itself is notoriously poorly optimized]

2.The modpack's foliage quality defaults to вҖҢFastвҖҢ (non-transparent). вҖҢEnabling shaders may cause unusual leaf renderingвҖҢ. To resolve this, navigate to вҖҢVideo Settings > quality > foliage > DefaultвҖҢ.

3.вҖҢFor versions below 1.12.2 (which are typically OptiFine-centric):вҖҢ Due to OptiFine's licensing restrictions, the modpack does вҖҢnotвҖҢ include OptiFine itself. You need to download and install OptiFine separately.

4.This modpack includes entity culling optimizations to boost performance. During gameplay, this will cause distant entities to not render. If you require distant entity rendering, you can increase the distance by adjusting the entity culling settings in вҖҢSodium/Embeddium: Extras and RuOK.

5.вҖҢThe modpack is licensed under the вҖҢMIT LicenseвҖҢ. You are free to share, modify, this modpack, or use it as a base for creating new modpacks. However, you вҖҢmust retain the original copyright noticeвҖҢ. The modpack is вҖҢcompletely freeвҖҢ.
#вҖҢKnown Issues with Mods
1.In some versions, the Starlight mod (including its high-version port ScalableLux) may conflict with Create. If this occurs, try removing Starlight or rolling back Create to an earlier version.

2.On certain devices, ImmediatelyFast may cause negative optimization (rare). If performance is unsatisfactory, disable this mod and retest to rule it out as the cause.

3.In 1.20.1Fabric versions, darkened shaders may occur due to incompatibility with the renderer. Try rolling back Sodium and Iris Shaders to older versions.

4.In NeoForge/Forge versions 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, the Accelerated Rendering mod significantly improves entity-heavy scenarios. However, it may fail to run on most Apple devices and mobile platforms. Disable this mod if issues arise.
# Q&A
Q:Why is there a prompt for me to add FerriteCore when I enter?\
A:This is a feature of ModernFix. вҖҢFerriteCore is a memory-saving modвҖҢ, but it may affect frame rates. Given that вҖҢvanilla Minecraft's memory usage is generally efficientвҖҢ, this mod has not been added. You can safely ignore this prompt and вҖҢclick "Continue" in the bottom-left cornerвҖҢ to proceed to the join menu.

вҖҢQ: Why is the modpack ineffective for versions below 1.12.2, or why does it prompt me to install OptiFine?\
вҖҢA:вҖҢ For versions below 1.12.2 (which rely on OptiFine as the core optimization), OptiFine is вҖҢnotвҖҢ included in the modpack due to its licensing restrictions. You need to install OptiFine separately.
Download the вҖҢmod fileвҖҢ for your specific game version from the official OptiFine website and place it into your mods folder.

Q:Is there any recommended version to use? Which versions have the best performance?\
A:1.21.10FabricгҖҒ1.21.1NeoForgeгҖҒ1.20.1ForgeгҖҒ1.16.5ForgeгҖҒ1.7.10Forge
